name: Emirati Arabic
notes: Emirati Arabic (إماراتي). UAE: Abu Dhabi, Dubai, Sharjah, RAK. k → /tʃ/ before front vowels (robust Gulf feature). ق → /ɡ/ (traditional). Heaviest English influence of all Gulf dialects (Dubai effect): /p/, /v/, /tʃ/, /ŋ/ thoroughly integrated. South Asian (Indian/Pakistani) community influence on lexicon. Interior/tribal varieties (RAK, Fujairah) more conservative.

sources.author: Watson, J.C.E.
sources.title: The Phonology and Morphology of Arabic

sources.author: Holes, C.
sources.title: Modern Arabic: Structures, Functions, and Varieties
